zh.Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰巴爾的摩巴爾的摩
zh.lifeSummary: Roger Matthews於1651年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰巴爾的摩巴爾的摩。他於大約1677年與Hannah Cord在美國馬里蘭州巴爾的摩結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1705年住在美國馬里蘭州巴爾的摩。他去世在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Roger Matthews于1651年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰巴爾的摩巴爾的摩。他于大约1677年与Hannah Cord在美国马里兰州巴爾的摩结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1705年住在美国马里兰州巴爾的摩。他去世在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰。

nameMeanings.name: Matthews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (Ulster and County Louth): patronymic from the personal name Matthew . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, such as German Matthäus (from the personal name Matthäus, from Latin Matthaeus) and Slovenian Matavž (from an obsolete vernacular form of the personal name Matevž, from Latin Matthaeus). Compare Mathews .
Irish: Anglicized form of Mac Mathghamhna (see McMahon ).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Roger Matthews was born in 1651, in Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British Colonial America. He married Hannah Cord about 1677, in Baltimore, Maryland, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He lived in Baltimore, Maryland, United States in 1705. He died in Maryland, British Colonial America.

Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Baltimore, Maryland, États-Unis en 1705. Il est décédé à Maryland, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British: イギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州ボーティモーボーティモー
ja.lifeSummary: Roger Matthewsは1651年にイギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州ボーティモーボーティモーで生まれた。約1677年にアメリカ合衆国メリーランド州ボーティモーでHannah Cordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1705年にはアメリカ合衆国メリーランド州ボーティモーに住んでいた。彼はイギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州で死去した。

ko.Baltimore, Maryland, British Colonial Am: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 바팀어
ko.Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 바팀어 바팀어
ko.lifeSummary: Roger Matthews(은)는 1651년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 바팀어 바팀어에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1677년 미국 메릴랜드 주 바팀어에서 Hannah Cord(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1705년도에 미국 메릴랜드 주 바팀어에서 살았다. 그는 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주에서 사망했다.

ru.Baltimore, Baltimore, Maryland, British: балтимор, балтимор, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Roger Matthews родился в 1651 г. в местности балтимор, балтимор, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Cord около 1677 г. в местности балтимор, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности балтимор, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты в 1705 году. Он умер в местности Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика.
